markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Matheus Pucinelli de Almeida wins the Nunez vs Pucinelli de Almeida professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Quito Round Of 16 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Nunez vs Pucinelli de Almeida professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Quito Round Of 16 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Matheus Pucinelli de Almeida win the Nunez vs Pucinelli de Almeida: Round Of 16 match?
